verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'd travel far to tell the good news of God's love And show the world His pow'r is yet the same Though often times most people do not seem to care There's always someone who'll listen and be blessed

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Just to be a blessing I'd go on a journey I'd climb up the highest mountain And cross the deep blue sea I'd leave home and family I'd go where the Spirit leads me I'm giving my life away just to be a blessing

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I never cared for preaching High theology To share God's love is good enough for me When sinners find the way to perfect liberty I give God glory for He's just using me
